meta.name: enterprise-rag-demo-mini
meta.description: 内置极小演示语料，用于冷启动时快速体验系统界面与流程。

chunks_A:
[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
Enterprise RAG demo note: The system supports two retrieval strategies. Method A uses fixed-size chunking and Method B uses layout-aware chunking with bounding-box denoising.

[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
Cold-start guidance: If full indexing is not ready, load demo chunks first so users can enter the main interface immediately and test Q&A plus dashboard tabs.

[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
Recommended fallback response: explain that demo mode is for体验 and should be replaced by full PDF indexing for production evaluation accuracy.
chunks_B:
[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
Enterprise RAG demo note: Method B keeps layout semantics by grouping meaningful text blocks and dropping noisy OCR fragments.

[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
Demo mode objective: reduce waiting time during initialization and provide an out-of-box experience for product walkthrough.

[Source: demo_enterprise_rag_notes.pdf]
After demo verification, users can upload real PDFs and rebuild dual indexes to obtain rigorous retrieval and evaluation results.

ground_truth.question: 为什么要提供 Demo 模式？
ground_truth.answer: 为了在冷启动期间降低等待成本，让用户快速体验系统主流程与界面。

ground_truth.question: Demo 模式和正式建库有什么区别？
ground_truth.answer: Demo 模式是小样本预置数据，正式建库基于用户上传 PDF，结果更完整可靠。
